title: Notifications linking to custom views instead of Main Table
excerpt: Currently when receiving a notification with a link to an item or board, the link takes the user to the Main Table board view. It would be better if the link could take users to a custom board view. This would help impro…

posts.author: jonamerin (Jon Vorabutra)
posts.cookedHtml: Currently when receiving a notification with a link to an item or board, the link takes the user to the Main Table board view. It would be better if the link could take users to a custom board view. This would help improve the user experience and reduce the number of clicks.
